notes: SCRIPTORIUM is support layer and not a new canon organ by default.
Statuses are conservative; VERIFIED requires explicit recent evidence.
Act 3 seed checker registered for address/truth/capability spine.
Sanctum adaptive operator layer scripts registered (state build + checker).
Act 4 registration corridor checker registered; READY_FOR_AGENT negative gate enforced.
Act 5 prefire current-truth coherence checker registered (synthesis/current state/entrypoint guard).
Act 5 warning budget policy checker registered (fake-green blocker policy enforcement).
Act 5 advisory ingest + modernization skeleton checker registered (advisory authority and step-sequencing guards).
Act 5 first-four-organs readiness checker registered (contract/self-report/readiness governance guard).
Act 5 work-session / Administratum ACK skeleton tools and checker registered (continuation policy guard).
Act 5 Sanctum action registry checker registered (action-id/risk/gate/receipt governance for Step 6).
